entries.source: Our Policy on “Do Not Track” Signals:
entries.value: Namu manufa a kan “kada a bibiyi” Signals:

entries.source: Our Service allows you to post, link, store, share and otherwise make available certain information, text, graphics, videos, or other material (“Content”). You are responsible for Content that you post on or through Service, including its legality, reliability, and appropriateness. By posting Content on or through Service, You represent and warrant that: (i) Content is yours (you own it) and/or you have the right to use it and the right to grant us the rights and license as provided in these Terms, and (ii) that the posting of your Content on or through Service does not violate the privacy rights, publicity rights, copyrights, contract rights or any other rights of any person or entity. We reserve the right to terminate the account of anyone found to be infringing on a copyright. You retain any and all of your rights to any Content you submit, post or display on or through Service and you are responsible for protecting those rights. We take no responsibility and assume no liability for Content you or any third party posts on or through Service. However, by posting Content using Service you grant us the right and license to use, modify, publicly perform, publicly display, reproduce, and distribute such Content on and through Service. You agree that this license includes the right for us to make your Content available to other users of Service, who may also use your Content subject to these Terms. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) has the right but not the obligation to monitor and edit all Content provided by users. In addition, Content found on or through this Service are the property of Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) or used with permission. You may not distribute, modify, transmit, reuse, download, repost, copy, or use said Content, whether in whole or in part, for commercial purposes or for personal gain, without express advance written permission from us.
entries.value: Namu Service allows kai don post, haɗi, store, raba da otherwise sa available certain information, text, graphics, videos, ko other material (“abun ciki”). kai suna responsible don abun ciki that kai post a kan ko ta hanyar Service, including its legality, reliability, da appropriateness. ta posting abun ciki a kan ko ta hanyar Service, kai represent da warrant that: (i) abun ciki shi ne yours (kai own it) da/or kai have the daidai don amfani da it da the daidai don grant mu the haƙƙoƙi da license as provided a cikin these Terms, da (ii) that the posting na naka abun ciki a kan ko ta hanyar Service ba ya violate the privacy haƙƙoƙi, publicity haƙƙoƙi, copyrights, contract haƙƙoƙi ko any other haƙƙoƙi na any person ko entity. mu reserve the daidai don terminate the asusu na anyone found don be infringing a kan a haƙƙa cikin mallaka. kai retain any da all na naka haƙƙoƙi don any abun ciki kai submit, post ko display a kan ko ta hanyar Service da kai suna responsible don protecting those haƙƙoƙi. mu take no responsibility da assume no alhaki don abun ciki kai ko any third party posts a kan ko ta hanyar Service. However, ta posting abun ciki ta amfani da Service kai grant mu the daidai da license don amfani da, modify, publicly perform, publicly display, reproduce, da distribute such abun ciki a kan da ta hanyar Service. kai agree that this license includes the daidai don mu don sa naka abun ciki available don other users na Service, who na iya also amfani da naka abun ciki fanni don these Terms. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) has the daidai amma not the obligation don monitor da edit all abun ciki provided ta users. a cikin addition, abun ciki found a kan ko ta hanyar this Service suna the property na Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) ko an yi amfani da tare da permission. kai na iya not distribute, modify, transmit, reuse, download, repost, kwafe, ko amfani da said abun ciki, whether a cikin whole ko a cikin part, don commercial purposes ko don sirri gain, ba tare da express advance written permission daga mu.

entries.source: Our Service may contain links to other sites that are not operated by us. If you click a third party link, you will be directed to that third party’s site. We strongly advise you to review the Privacy Policy of every site you visit. We assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies or practices of any third party sites or services.

If kai click a third party haɗi, kai zai be directed don that third party’s site. mu strongly advise kai don bita the manufar sirri na kowane site kai visit. mu assume no responsibility don the abun ciki, privacy policies ko practices na any third party sites ko services.

entries.source: Parents
entries.value: Iyaye

entries.source: Parents are often trying to help without taking over. inspir gives families public modes that make learning behavior visible: hints, questions, explain-back, review, and study planning.
entries.value: Iyaye suna often trying don taimako ba tare da rubutawa over. inspir gives iyalai na jama’a modes that sa learning hali visible: alamomi, tambayoyi, bayyana-back, bita, da karatu tsarawa.

entries.source: Parse the visual, identify relationships, explain uncertainty, and turn it into a learning step.
entries.value: Parse the na gani, identify relationships, bayyana rashin tabbas, da turn it zuwa a learning mataki.

entries.value: Fasfo zuwa duniyar tarihi

entries.source: Paste a question, your answer, and the expected answer if you have it. Your buddy explains the reasoning and helps you avoid the same mistake next time.
entries.value: Manne tambayar, amsarka, da kuma amsar da ake sa ran samu idan kana da ita. Abokinka zai yi bayanin dalilin kuma ya taimaka maka ka guji yin kuskure iri daya a gaba.

entries.value: Paste a small chunk na bayanai zuwa katin tunatarwa mai gina.

entries.source: Paste data, chart descriptions, or results and learn what they mean, what they do not mean, and what to ask next.
entries.value: Manne bayanai, bayanin jadawali, ko sakamako kuma ka koyi abin da suke nufi, abin da ba su nufi ba, da kuma abin da za ka tambaya nan gaba.

entries.source: Philosophy Lab
entries.value: Dakin Gwajin Falsafa

entries.source: Philosophy Lab AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore identity, knowledge, fairness, freedom, happiness, and other deep questions through careful reasoning.
entries.value: Dakin Gwajin Falsafa yanayin koyo ne na AI mai mayar da hankali; ana amfani da AI don koyo maimakon tara amsoshi kawai. An gina yanayin a kan aiki takamaimai: Bincika identity, ilimi, fairness, freedom, happiness, da other deep tambayoyi ta hanyar careful tunani.

entries.source: Philosophy Lab AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Falsafa Lab Yanayin Koyo na AI: jagora mai amfani

entries.source: Philosophy Lab prompts and study loop
entries.value: Saƙonnin Dakin Gwajin Falsafa da madaukin karatu

entries.source: philosophy tutor AI
entries.value: falsafa malami AI

entries.source: Photosynthesis: the process plants use to make food.
entries.value: Photosynthesis: the process plants amfani da don sa food.

entries.source: Pick any topic and face a focused 10-question multiple-choice quiz. You answer one question at a time, get instant feedback, and finish with a score and review.
entries.value: Zabi kowane jigo kuma fuskanci tambayoyi 10 na zabi da amsa. Za ka amsa tambaya daya a lokaci guda, ka samu amsa nan take, kuma ka kammala da maki da kuma bita.

entries.source: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.
entries.value: Zabi kowane batu kuma ka fafata a muhawarar gaskiya. Zabi bangare, fuskanci kalubale, kuma ka koyi yadda za ka gabatar da hujjoji masu karfi.

entries.source: Pick review targets
entries.value: Zaɓi abubuwan da za a yi bita

entries.source: Pick the learning job first, open the matching public mode, paste or adapt one starter prompt, then ask for a check, quiz, flashcard, or next-step review.
entries.value: Pick the aikin koyo farko, bude the matching na jama’a mode, paste ko adapt one starter saƙo, sannan tambaya don a bincika, tambayoyi, katin tunatarwa, ko na gaba-mataki bita.

entries.source: Pick the learning job first, then jump into the right public guest mode, starter prompt, study path, or guide without hunting through a generic chatbot.
entries.value: Pick the aikin koyo farko, sannan jump zuwa the daidai yanayin baƙo na jama’a, starter saƙo, karatu path, ko jagora ba tare da hunting ta hanyar a generic chatbot.

entries.source: Practice transfer. Ask for a similar problem with different numbers, wording, or context.
entries.value: Atisaye transfer. tambaya don a similar problem tare da different numbers, wording, ko mahaɗi.

entries.source: Practice viva, oral exams, project defenses, and rapid follow-up questions with calm feedback.
entries.value: Yi atisayen viva, jarabawar baka, kare ayyukan karatu, da tambayoyin biyo baya cikin sauri tare da ra'ayi mai natsuwa.

entries.source: Practice, not answer-copying
entries.value: Atisaye, ba kwafin amsa ba

entries.source: Practise inside the lesson
entries.value: Yi aiki a cikin darasi

entries.source: Practise recall
entries.value: Yi aikin tunawa

entries.source: Practise retrieval before rereading
entries.value: Yi atisayen dawo da sani kafin sake karantawa

entries.source: Practise saying it
entries.value: Yi atisayen faɗarsa

entries.source: Predict grades and plan score targets
entries.value: Yi hasashen maki kuma tsara manufofin maki

entries.source: Predict what the code or data should do before asking for help.
entries.value: Predict abin da the lamba ko bayanai ya kamata do kafin asking don taimako.

entries.source: Predict what the code or data should do before asking.
entries.value: Predict abin da the lamba ko bayanai ya kamata do kafin asking.

entries.source: Predict, explain, test mentally or safely, and reflect on evidence.
entries.value: Predict, bayyana, gwada mentally ko safely, da yi tunani a kan shaida.

entries.source: Prefer lesson blocks, maps, simulations, contrast pairs, rubrics, and concise coach prompts over free-form lecture.
entries.value: Prefer lesson blocks, taswirori, simulations, contrast pairs, rubrics, da concise koci saƙonni over kyauta-form lecture.

entries.source: Prepare a deep work session with a clear outcome, constraints, focus rules, review checkpoint, and fallback plan.
entries.value: Shirya zaman karatu mai zurfi tare da bayyanannen buri, iyakoki, dokokin mai da hankali, wurin duba ci gaba, da kuma shirin madadin.

entries.source: Prepare clear forum questions, replies, summaries, and follow-up requests that make student discussions more useful.
entries.value: Shirya tambayoyin dandalin da suka bayyana sarai, martani, taƙaitawa, da buƙatun biyo baya waɗanda ke sa tattaunawar ɗalibai ta zama mai amfani.

entries.source: Prepare for an exam
entries.value: Shirya don jarabawa

entries.source: Prepare for an exam with active recall
entries.value: Prepare don an exam tare da tunawa mai aiki

entries.source: Prepare for oral questioning
entries.value: Shirya don tambayoyin baka

entries.source: Prepare for oral questioning.
entries.value: Prepare don oral questioning.

entries.source: Prepare for school, internship, job, or scholarship interviews with realistic questions and feedback.
entries.value: Shirya don hirar makaranta, horo, aiki, ko tallafin karatu tare da tambayoyi na gaske da kuma ra'ayi.

entries.source: Prepare learners for oral exams through realistic questioning.
entries.value: Prepare masu koyo don oral exams ta hanyar mai kama da gaske questioning.

entries.source: Prepare speeches, presentations, interviews, or oral exams with prompts, timing, and feedback on structure.
entries.value: Shirya jawabai, gabatarwa, hirar aiki, ko jarabawar baka tare da saƙonni, lokaci, da ra'ayi kan tsari.

entries.source: Prepare study resources for classmates or a group: summaries, links, notes, explanations, and usage guidance.
entries.value: Shirya albarkatun karatu don abokan karatu ko ƙungiya: taƙaitaccen bayani, hanyoyin haɗi, bayanan kula, bayani, da jagorar amfani.

entries.source: Prepared courses, videos, and exercises are strongest when the learner knows the topic sequence.
entries.value: Prepared courses, videos, da exercises suna strongest lokacin da the mai koyo knows the batu sequence.

entries.source: Present an argument, wait for rebuttal, identify weak spots, and strengthen the learner's reasoning.
entries.value: Present an hujja, wait don rebuttal, identify weak spots, da strengthen the mai koyo's tunani.

entries.source: Present evidence, ask for decisions, reveal consequences, and debrief principles.
entries.value: Present shaida, tambaya don decisions, reveal consequences, da debrief ka’idoji.

entries.source: Press facts
entries.value: Manema labarai gaskiya

entries.source: Primary audience
entries.value: Na farko masu amfani

entries.source: Primary homepage citation
entries.value: Na farko homepage ambato

entries.source: Primary navigation
entries.value: Babbar kewayawa

entries.source: Principles
entries.value: Principles

entries.source: Prioritize assignments
entries.value: Ba da fifiko ga ayyuka

entries.source: Prioritize by urgency and effort, break tasks down, and update status.
entries.value: Prioritize ta urgency da effort, break tasks down, da update status.

entries.source: Prioritize topics
entries.value: Ba da fifiko ga batutuwa

entries.source: Prioritize topics.
entries.value: Prioritize batutuwa.

entries.source: Prioritize, schedule, add practice and review, then adjust as progress changes.
entries.value: Prioritize, jadawali, add atisaye da bita, sannan adjust as ci gaba canje-canje.

entries.source: Prioritize, shrink oversized tasks, track progress, and close with a review.
entries.value: Prioritize, shrink oversized tasks, bibiyi ci gaba, da close tare da a bita.

entries.source: Privacy
entries.value: Sirri

entries.source: Privacy policy
entries.value: Manufar sirri

entries.source: Privacy Policy
entries.value: Manufar Sirri

entries.source: Privacy Policy | inspir
entries.value: Manufar Sirri | inspir

entries.source: Private saved chat URLs are not sitemap-listed and are not included in llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or the JSON AI content catalog.
entries.value: Na sirri saved chat URLs ba su taswirar shafi-listed da ba su included a cikin llms.txt, llms-full.txt, ko the JSON AI abun ciki catalog.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is not equally available. A free public AI learning platform can help reduce that access gap by giving more people a patient first place to learn.
entries.value: Na sirri tutoring shi ne powerful, amma Shi ne not equally available. Wani kyauta na jama’a koyon AI dandali zai iya taimakawa reduce that samun dama gap ta giving ƙarin people a patient farko place don koyi.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is unevenly distributed. inspir uses AI to widen access while keeping the learner active: hints before answers, questions before lectures, and practice after explanation.
entries.value: Na sirri tutoring shi ne powerful, amma Shi ne unevenly distributed. inspir uses AI don widen samun dama while keeping the mai koyo mai aiki: alamomi kafin amsoshi, tambayoyi kafin lectures, da atisaye bayan explanation.

entries.value: Samfuri mahanga

entries.value: ci gaba dashboard

entries.value: Dashboard na Ci gaba

entries.source: progress summary
entries.value: ci gaba taƙaitawa

entries.source: Prohibited Uses
entries.value: Prohibited Uses

entries.source: Project Coach
entries.value: Mai Ba da Shawara kan Ayyuka

entries.source: Project Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan a school, creative, coding, or personal project with scope, milestones, blockers, and next actions.
entries.value: Kocin Aiki yanayin koyo ne na AI mai mayar da hankali; ana amfani da AI don koyo maimakon tara amsoshi kawai. An gina yanayin a kan aiki takamaimai: Tsara a makaranta, creative, rubuta lamba, ko sirri aiki tare da scope, milestones, blockers, da na gaba actions.

entries.source: Project Coach AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Aiki koci Yanayin Koyo na AI: jagora mai amfani
